name: capcut-cli
description: Programmatically edit CapCut / JianYing video drafts via the capcut-cli (renezander030/capcut-cli) — inspect, build, subtitle, caption, translate, and cut projects by reading/writing the local draft store directly. JSON in, JSON out; no server.

install.notes: Pure-Node CLI published to npm. Exposes the `capcut` binary. Update with `npm install -g capcut-cli@latest`. Optional tools unlock specific commands: FFmpeg/ffprobe for render + media metadata, Whisper for caption, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for translate.

integration_test.description: Environment preflight — checks Node, ffmpeg/ffprobe, whisper, API key, and CapCut/JianYing draft directories.

post_install_hints: Run `capcut doctor` to confirm the environment and that CapCut/JianYing draft folders are detected.
Optional: install FFmpeg + ffprobe for `render` and automatic media metadata (Windows: `winget install Gyan.FFmpeg`; macOS: `brew install ffmpeg`; Linux: `sudo apt install ffmpeg`).
Optional: install Whisper for `caption` (`pip install openai-whisper`), and set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for `translate`.

capcut-cli never uploads projects and never renders CapCut's final output — open the draft in CapCut to review and export. Automated upload to short-video platforms is prohibited; the publish click stays human.
